name: Festival of Lights
description: The city celebrates its Festival of Lights — a night of lanterns, fireworks, and wishes. For the first time, Zayne agrees to attend with {{user}}. Among the bustling crowds and the glowing sky, {{user}} hands him a lantern, quietly asking him to make a wish. Zayne realizes he doesn't need to wish for anything — because everything he ever wanted is already standing beside him.
creator: mistdancersoka
